10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve – Easier inflation made simple - Bike-Discount
10.evidenceText: No pricing information found in the provided content. The page describes product features, awards, and FAQs but contains no retail price data.
10.extractionRationale: The source content does not contain any retail prices, numeric currency values, or pricing references for the Schwalbe Clik Valve product. The page focuses exclusively on product features, system description, and imagery.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless-Ventil - 2er Set - 60 mm | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Three distinct product pages identified: p1859949.html (60mm), p1859948.html (40mm), and p1859950.html (80mm). Source 4 is a category page, Source 5 is an accessory (tube). Only the three valve product pages count.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product URLs for Clik valve listings. Excluded Source 4 (category/filter page) and Source 5 (inner tube accessory with Clik valve). Three distinct valve products identified by different sizes: 40mm, 60mm, and 80mm variants.

30.evidenceText: All 4 product listings from bike24.com (40mm, 60mm, 80mm valves and conversion kit) contain product descriptions but no stock status indicators are present in the provided content.
30.extractionRationale: None of the 4 sources contain any mention of stock status, availability, out-of-stock, or unavailability. The text snippets provided do not include the stock information that would typically appear on product listing pages, so stock status cannot be determined.

56.evidenceText: The filtered butyl tubes page includes "Clik Valve" as a filter option, but the specific tube models listed (TUBE 14, TUBE 19, TUBE 19L) all show valve type "AV" not Clik valve. Sources 4 and 5 describe standalone Clik valve products, not tubes.
56.extractionRationale: The evidence does not provide explicit documentation of distinct inner tube SKUs with Clik valve interface. Source 3 mentions Clik Valve as a filter property on a tubes page, but the actual tube models shown use AV valves. Sources 4-5 are valve products, not tubes. Sources 1-2 are general marketing without specific tube models.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3558.07 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the aluminum price of 3558.07 USD/Tonne directly from the source text. This is already in the requested USD per metric ton format.

62.evidenceText: Aluminium P1020A premium, ddp Midwest US, US cents/lb. The specific premium value is not provided in the available content.
62.extractionRationale: Source 2 identifies the correct commodity (Aluminium P1020A premium, DDP Midwest US) and unit (US cents/lb), but the actual numerical value is not present in the provided content snippet. Source 1 contains a number (1,793.99) but does not clearly indicate it is the aluminum premium in cents/lb format.
